alerts.title: Claude AI Weaponized in Mexican Government Cyberattack
alerts.description: Hacker used 1,000+ Claude Code prompts combined with GPT-4.1 to breach 10 Mexican government agencies and 1 financial institution between December 2025 and March 2026. This represents the first documented large-scale AI-powered government cyberattack using commercial LLMs.

aldeci_relevance.impact: MPTE must simulate AI-assisted attack chains
aldeci_relevance.action: Add AI-powered attack scenarios to MPTE playbooks

alerts.title: 30 CVEs in MCP Ecosystem — 36.7% SSRF Exposure
alerts.description: Analysis of 7,000+ MCP servers found 36.7% vulnerable to SSRF attacks. 30 CVEs in ~15 months. Microsoft MarkItDown MCP had severe SSRF enabling AWS key theft. Root cause: MCP designed for functionality — auth optional, authz 'left to implementation,' encryption not required.

indicators.critical_example: Microsoft MarkItDown MCP — AWS key theft via SSRF

aldeci_relevance.impact: ALdeci's 705+ MCP tools must be SSRF-protected
aldeci_relevance.action: Security-analyst to review mcp_server.py and mcp_router.py

alerts.title: n8n CVE-2026-21858 — CVSS 10.0 Unauthenticated RCE
alerts.description: Critical unauthenticated remote code execution in n8n workflow automation platform (CVSS 10.0). Approximately 100,000 servers affected. Content-Type confusion in Form Webhook file upload enables arbitrary code execution without authentication.

aldeci_relevance.impact: Validates MPTE for AI toolchain testing
aldeci_relevance.action: Add n8n-style RCE patterns to MPTE verification

alerts.title: Wiz/Google $32B Acquisition Closing March 2026
alerts.description: Wiz acquisition by Google for $32B closing end of March 2026. All major regulatory approvals secured. Staff payout $2-2.5B. CISPE publicly alarmed about Google controlling both cloud infra and security scanning. Creates 'Switzerland' market opportunity.

aldeci_relevance.action: Marketing to prepare 'Switzerland' messaging for March 6 demo

alerts.title: 3 Critical Unauthenticated RCE CVEs Published (Mar 1-2)
alerts.description: Three new critical unauthenticated RCE vulnerabilities published in NVD: CVE-2026-2999 (IDExpert arbitrary executable download), CVE-2026-3000 (IDExpert arbitrary DLL download), CVE-2026-3422 (U-Office Force insecure deserialization). All enable unauthenticated remote code execution.

aldeci_relevance.impact: Brain pipeline CVE enrichment should flag these
aldeci_relevance.action: Feed into ALdeci CVE correlation engine

alerts.title: Gartner CTEM Validation + CrowdStrike Q4 Tomorrow
alerts.description: Gartner predicts organizations with CTEM programs are 3x less likely to suffer a breach by 2026. CrowdStrike Q4 FY2026 results releasing March 3 after market close. eCrime breakout time now 29 minutes average, 27 seconds fastest. AI adversary operations up 89% YoY.

market_data.mcp_adoption: 30% of enterprise app vendors launching MCP in 2026
market_data.agentic_ai: 67% of orgs using, 48% see as top attack vector

aldeci_relevance.impact: CTEM validation from Gartner strengthens ALdeci positioning
